name: vane_web_search
description: Calls the Vane API web search endpoint with provider IDs, model keys, and a query. Must get available providers from http://localhost:3000/api/providers first. Use the appropriate and best chat and embedding models possible. Chat models like gemma, deepseek, and gpt are preferred if available. Output follows the wiki's ai-research-multi source schema (WIKI_SCHEMA.md) — includes an HTML comment metadata header with type, search_date (ISO 8601 with timestamp), query, tool_used, tool_model, embedding_model, and sources list (each with url, title, website, published_date). IMPORTANT: Always present the FULL output verbatim — the schema header, the message body, and the Sources section. Do NOT summarize, reformat, truncate, or abstract away any part of the output. The message body contains inline citations [n] that reference the numbered sources — preserve these exactly. To save the result as a wiki source file, use --save flag which writes to ai-research/web/{slug}-{date}.md. File naming follows the schema convention: {topic-slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md in ai-research/web/.
